reasoning: Liu Zige's 200m butterfly LC record of 2:01.81 was set in the 2009 super-suit era and remains one of the hardest swimming records to break. Even Summer McIntosh's 2024 Olympic gold was over a second slower (2:03.03), and Regan Smith swims in the high 2:03s. Furthermore, the winter months (Nov-Feb) rarely feature major long course tapered events, as December typically focuses on short course competitions (such as the SC World Championships). Given the 16-year standing of the record and the lack of major long course events in the forecast window, the chance of the record falling is almost nonexistent, so the estimations reflect the maximum confidence bounded by the tool parameters.
